description.value:
Prerequisite: Quick Draw, Blinkstrike +1 class ability, Kenjutsu: Iaido (5).

Benefit: While in the Blinkstrike stance, you can sheathe a weapon as a free action, without provoking attacks of opportunity. In addition, you may spend 1 meta-Chakra charge to increase your Blinkstrike bonus by +2 for one round while making a Full Attack. Can be used three times per encounter. This bonus cannot be active at the same time as that of True Blinkstrike.
description.summary: While in the Blinkstrike stance, you can sheathe a weapon as a free action, without provoking attacks of opportunity.…
